assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates Phase 1 (L4 pool upgrade) and Phase 3 (A100 pool upgrade) with distinct strategies and timelines

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response uses node pool replacement strategy instead of surge upgrade, creating new pools rather than configuring maxSurge parameters

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response mentions testing 1.30 compatibility with ML frameworks but does not specifically address GPU driver versions or auto-installed driver compatibility

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states to coordinate with ML teams on training job schedules and wait for current training jobs to complete before migration

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly mention that GPU VMs don't support live migration or that pods will restart causing latency spikes

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific PodDisruptionBudget configurations for inference workloads with minAvailable: 80%

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response does not address the specific issue of auto-scaler creating nodes at old versions during upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response mentions testing 1.30 compatibility generally but does not specifically recommend testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging
